title: vnd.cyrus.imip (Cyrus IMAP)
description: LEGACY alias for processcalendar (RFC 9671). Cyrus maps vnd.cyrus.imip to the newer processcalendar extension. Full syntax: processimip [:invitesonly | :deletecanceled] [:outcome <variable>] [:errstr <variable>] [:calendarid <calendar-id>]. Processes RFC 6047 iMIP calendar invitations (requests, responses, cancellations) during LMTP delivery. Implement as compatibility alias pointing to processcalendar.
